name: no_empty_directories_not_in_inv

proof fn phi_4_no_empty_directories_not_in_inv(arch: Arch, entries: Seq<NodeEntry>, layer: nat, sub_entries: Seq<NodeEntry>)
    requires
        arch.inv(),
        layer < arch.layers.len(),
        layer + 1 < arch.layers.len(),
        entries.len() == arch.num_entries(layer),
        sub_entries.len() == arch.num_entries((layer + 1) as nat),
        forall|i: nat| i < sub_entries.len() ==> sub_entries[i as int] is Invalid,
        entries[0] == NodeEntry::Directory(Directory { entries: sub_entries, layer: layer + 1, base_vaddr: 0, arch }),
        forall|i: nat| 0 < i < entries.len() ==> entries[i as int] is Invalid,
    ensures
        (Directory { entries, layer, base_vaddr: 0, arch }).inv(),
{
}
reason: A directory with an all-Invalid subdirectory (empty directory) satisfies `inv()` — the `no_empty_directories` predicate is defined but not enforced in `inv()`
